name: Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit (165°C).
2. Prepare a tube pan or two 9x5 inch loaf pans.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites with 1 cup of sugar until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
4. In another large bowl, cream the butter and work in the flour until combined.
5. Beat together the egg yolks, remaining sugar, and vanilla extract.
6. Gradually stir in the butter mixture into the yolk mixture.
7. Gently fold in the whites until fully incorporated.
8. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pans.
